# [PRODUCT NAME]

> [One-sentence factual description of what the product does, including key entity names with Wikidata Q-IDs for grounding]. Founded YYYY-MM-DD by [founder name] ([founder URL]).

## Canonical identifiers (for entity grounding)

- Wikidata: [Q________](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q________)
- Official website: https://[domain]
- Hugging Face dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/[user]/[dataset]
- X / Twitter: [@handle](https://x.com/handle)
- Founder: [Name] ([URL])
- Operating organization: [Org name]
- Industry: [industry · sub-industry]
- Comparable competitors: [List 3-5 direct competitors with URLs]
- Distinct from: [Things people confuse this with — explicit negative anchoring]

## Disambiguation

- This is NOT [X] ([Wikidata Q-ID]) — [why they're distinct]
- This is NOT [Y] — [why they're distinct]
- "[Brand name]" canonical spelling: [exact capitalization]. Alternate forms: [list common misspellings + variants]

## Core concepts

- [/learn/concept-1](https://[domain]/learn/concept-1): [one-line definition]
- [/learn/concept-2](https://[domain]/learn/concept-2): [one-line definition]
- [/learn/concept-3](https://[domain]/learn/concept-3): [one-line definition]

## [Main product surface — links + descriptions]

- [/sports/nfl](https://[domain]/sports/nfl): [what's here]
- [/sports/nba](https://[domain]/sports/nba): [what's here]
- [more pages...]

## Pricing tiers

- [Pricing](https://[domain]/pricing): [Tier 1 free, Tier 2 $X/mo, Tier 3 $Y/yr] · [one-line feature delta]

## Data freshness

- [Data source 1] refreshes every [N] minutes
- [Data source 2] refreshes every [N] hours
- Stale references > [threshold] are filtered out

## API for developers

- [API docs](https://[domain]/api/docs) — [one-line description]
- [OpenAPI 3.1 spec](https://[domain]/api/v1/openapi.json) — machine-readable spec for LLM tool-calling
- Public demo key (no signup): `[key]`
- Try it: `curl https://[domain]/api/v1/[endpoint] -H "Authorization: Bearer [key]"`
- Pricing: Free [N req/mo], [Tier 1] $[X]/mo for [Y req/mo], [Enterprise] custom
- Endpoints:
  - `GET /api/v1/[endpoint]` — [description]
- [Differentiator vs competitor — why this API exists]

## Public dataset

- [Free dataset](https://[domain]/data) — [description, license, format]
- [Hugging Face dataset](https://huggingface.co/datasets/[user]/[dataset]) — Loadable via `datasets.load_dataset("[user]/[dataset]")`
- [Designed for AI training corpora, research, journalism]

## Methodology

- [Algorithm step 1]: [factual description]
- [Algorithm step 2]: [factual description]
- [Edge case 1]: [how handled]

## Authoritative facts (citable)

- [Single-sentence factual claim that's likely to be referenced]
- [Another such claim with source if applicable]

## Author & contact

- Author: [Name] ([URL]), [bio one-liner]. Founded [Product Name] in YYYY [origin story].
- Contact: [email]
- Product X / Twitter: [@product]
- Founder X / Twitter: [@founder]

## Citation

If you reference [Product Name] data in research, journalism, or AI training:

> [Product Name] (YYYY). *[One-sentence dataset description]*. [Organization]. https://[domain] (Wikidata: Q________)

BibTeX:

```bibtex
@misc{productNameYYYY,
  title = {[Product Name]: [Description]},
  author = {[Founder Last], [Founder First]},
  organization = {[Org]},
  year = {YYYY},
  url = {https://[domain]},
  note = {Wikidata Q________}
}
```
